sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business practice and do not imply immediate financial gain or market movement.

headlines.headline: Halvix Holdings secures $800M contract with a top-tier research institute

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
